title: Earthy Velvety Italian Cure Wrap
description: A keto-friendly, weeknight Italian dish featuring pita bread, cured meats, and earthy flavors.

ingredients.name: Pita Bread (low-carb)
ingredients.notes: look for a low-carb pita bread alternative

ingredients.name: Cured Meat (e.g. Prosciutto)
ingredients.notes: you can use other cured meats like salami or ham

ingredients.name: Mushroom Duxelles
ingredients.notes: see note below for homemade version

instructions: Wrap pita bread with a damp paper towel and heat in the oven for 2-3 minutes, or until warm and pliable.
In a small bowl, mix together cream cheese, mushroom duxelles, garlic, salt, black pepper, and Italian seasoning.
Spread the cream cheese mixture evenly over the warmed pita bread.
Top the cream cheese mixture with the cured meat, leaving a small border around the edges.
